Static analysis: no unhandled promise rejections, all error paths catch+toastError. TipTap loaded via dynamic import (ssr:false) prevents SSR crash. All API wrappers verified to exist. TypeCheck passed 0 errors across all 5 changed files.

improvements_found.observation: Tool status dropdown in ToolDetailPanel (line 159) uses `value={tool.status}` from the prop rather than local state. Status change has no optimistic update — UI only reflects new status after round-trip API call completes. Other fields (name, category, vendor, url) use local state with 500ms debounce for immediate visual feedback.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H1: Visibility of system status — users should see the result of their action immediately
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add local `status` state initialized from `tool.status`, reset in the useEffect when `tool.id` changes, and update it optimistically on dropdown change (same pattern as the other fields). No debounce needed for a select dropdown.

improvements_found.observation: When hasNeither is true (no tabs at all), the empty state copy says 'Create a process canvas AND a journey canvas' but only the 'Create Journey Tab' button is shown. After clicking, user is navigated to the new journey tab — they must then manually come back to create a process tab.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H6: Recognition rather than recall — guide users with CTAs for all required actions
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Either show a second 'Create Process Tab' button when processTab is also null, or update the guidance copy to acknowledge one will be created immediately.

improvements_found.observation: ToolSectionDetailPanel only exposes name and description fields. The spec mentions position_x/position_y/width/height are intentionally excluded from editing, which is correct. But there is no visual indicator of section tool count (how many tools are in this section) in the detail panel, even though this info is available client-side.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H7: Flexibility and efficiency of use — expert users benefit from contextual summary information
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add a read-only 'Tools in section' count to the ToolSectionDetailPanel summary header, derived from the parent via an optional `toolCount` prop.
